adapter_disclosure: Both roles use the same zero-effect identity. All adapter tensors are zeros; the tested difference comes from Router selection, scoped instructions, approved knowledge, and a verified handoff.

agents.label: Textile Agent
agents.role: Extract textile-specific sourcing, quality, production, traceability, and supply-risk considerations from the approved playbook.

agents.label: Business Plan Agent
agents.role: Turn the verified textile-industry brief into a concise, practical business plan.
